description: Create packages/quant-live package skeleton with streaming ASR, VAD, turn-taking, and latency tracking. Branch from current HEAD as feat/phase-41-quant-live-asr. Includes all core modules, types, tests, and package scaffold following voice-input conventions.
steps: Create and checkout new branch feat/phase-41-quant-live-asr from current HEAD (chore/phase-41-baseline-cleanup)

Create packages/quant-live/package.json following voice-input pattern: name @quant/quant-live, private, type module, main/types pointing to src/index.ts, scripts for typecheck/test/build/lint, devDependencies for @types/node, typescript ~5.5.0, vitest ^2
Create packages/quant-live/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.json with composite:true, outDir:./dist, rootDir:./src, include src/**/*
Create packages/quant-live/vitest.config.ts importing defineConfig from vitest/config

Create packages/quant-live/src/types.ts with all TypeScript interfaces: LiveSession (id, state, createdAt, config, transcript), LiveSessionState enum (idle/listening/processing/speaking/interrupted/ended), AudioChunk (data, sampleRate, channels, timestamp, duration), TranscriptSegment (id, speaker, text, startTime, endTime, confidence, isFinal), ASRResult (segments, isFinal, latencyMs), ASRProvider interface (start, stop, feedAudio, onResult, onError), VADEvent (type: speech-start/speech-end/silence, timestamp, confidence), VADConfig (threshold, silenceDuration, minSpeechDuration), TurnState (currentSpeaker: user/assistant/none, canInterrupt, turnStartedAt), PipelineStage enum (ASR/LLM/TTS/PLAYBACK), LatencyMetrics (stage, p50, p95, p99, samples, lastValue), LiveSessionConfig (asrProvider, vadConfig, enableInterruption, maxSessionDuration, language)

Create packages/quant-live/src/core/session-manager.ts: SessionManager class with create(), resume(id), end(id), getSession(id), getState(id) methods. State machine: idle->listening->processing->speaking->idle, with interrupted state reachable from speaking. Uses EventTarget or typed event emitter pattern for state change notifications.

Create packages/quant-live/src/core/pipeline.ts: LivePipeline class that orchestrates audio-in -> ASR -> LLM -> TTS -> audio-out. Methods: start(session), stop(), feedAudio(chunk), onTranscript(cb), onResponse(cb), onAudioOut(cb). The pipeline connects ASR provider, processes results, and tracks latency at each stage.

Create packages/quant-live/src/core/latency-tracker.ts: LatencyTracker class that tracks per-stage timing. Methods: startMeasure(stage, id), endMeasure(stage, id), getMetrics(stage), getAllMetrics(), reset(). Computes p50/p95/p99 from a sliding window of measurements.

Create packages/quant-live/src/asr/streaming-asr.ts: ASRProvider interface re-exported, plus ASRProviderFactory with create(type, config) factory method. Supported types: 'whisper-server', 'whisper-webgpu'.

Create packages/quant-live/src/asr/whisper-provider.ts: WhisperServerProvider class implementing ASRProvider. Streams audio chunks to an OpenAI-compatible /v1/audio/transcriptions endpoint. Uses ReadableStream/fetch for cross-platform compat. Handles partial transcript streaming.

Create packages/quant-live/src/asr/webgpu-whisper-provider.ts: WebGPUWhisperProvider class implementing ASRProvider. Stub implementation with isSupported() check (returns false in non-browser environments). Falls back to WhisperServerProvider when WebGPU unavailable. Interface fully defined for future implementation.

Create packages/quant-live/src/asr/vad.ts: VoiceActivityDetector class. Methods: start(config), stop(), feedAudio(chunk), onEvent(cb). Implements energy-based VAD with configurable threshold, silence duration detection, and speech start/end events. Enables interruption detection by signaling when user starts speaking during assistant output.

Create packages/quant-live/src/conversation/turn-manager.ts: TurnManager class. Methods: startTurn(speaker), endTurn(), getCurrentTurn(), handleInterruption(), canUserInterrupt(), onTurnChange(cb). Manages who is speaking, detects barge-in (user speaking while assistant is outputting), handles graceful interruption.

Create packages/quant-live/src/conversation/transcript.ts: TranscriptManager class. Methods: addSegment(segment), getFullTranscript(), getRecentSegments(n), getByTimestamp(start, end), getSpeakerSegments(speaker), clear(). Maintains running conversation transcript with speaker labels and timestamps.
Create packages/quant-live/src/index.ts: Re-export all public types from types.ts, all classes and factory functions from core/, asr/, and conversation/ modules.

Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/session-manager.test.ts: Test session lifecycle (create, resume, end), state transitions (idle->listening->processing->speaking->idle), invalid state transitions throw, event notifications on state change.

Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/streaming-asr.test.ts: Test ASRProviderFactory creates correct provider types, WhisperServerProvider handles audio chunks and emits results, WebGPUWhisperProvider falls back correctly.

Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/vad.test.ts: Test VAD detects speech start/end based on energy threshold, respects silence duration config, emits correct VADEvent types, handles edge cases (very short speech, continuous silence).
Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/turn-manager.test.ts: Test turn start/end, interruption detection (user speaks during assistant turn), barge-in handling, turn state queries.
Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/pipeline.test.ts: Test pipeline connects stages, feeds audio through ASR, handles transcript callbacks, tracks latency at each stage.
Create packages/quant-live/src/__tests__/latency-tracker.test.ts: Test measure start/end, p50/p95/p99 computation accuracy, sliding window behavior, per-stage isolation, reset functionality.
Run pnpm install from workspace root to register the new package
Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live typecheck to verify TypeScript compilation
Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live test to verify all tests pass
Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live build to verify build output
Run pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live lint to verify linting passes
Commit with message: feat(quant-live): add package skeleton with streaming ASR and VAD
acceptance_criteria: Branch feat/phase-41-quant-live-asr exists with all new files committed
pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live typecheck passes with zero errors
pnpm --filter @quant/quant-live test passes with all 6 test files green
All types are properly exported from src/index.ts
ASR streaming uses Web APIs (ReadableStream, fetch) for cross-platform compatibility
VAD correctly detects speech start/end and enables interruption detection
Total new lines added (excluding package-lock changes) stays within reasonable scope
